selected_skills.name: router
selected_skills.use: Route game-development requests to the minimal relevant skill set.

selected_skills.name: threejs-scene-setup
selected_skills.use: Keep three.js scene, renderer, camera, loop, and resize work aligned with current engine patterns.

selected_skills.name: camera-systems
selected_skills.use: Guide chase camera smoothing, framing, look behavior, and shake hooks.

selected_skills.name: game-feel
selected_skills.use: Tune feedback, thrust response, transient motion, and accessibility-aware polish.

selected_skills.name: physics-tuning
selected_skills.use: Tune timestep, damping, velocity caps, soft bounds, collision-like response, and stability of the existing hand-rolled flight integrator.

selected_skills.name: input-systems
selected_skills.use: Keep keyboard, pointer, and future gamepad controls ergonomic and testable.

selected_skills.name: game-ui-ux
selected_skills.use: Guide HUD, mode switching, responsive layout, and non-overlap checks.

selected_skills.name: performance-optimization
selected_skills.use: Preserve frame budget, bundle budget, and asset discipline.

selected_skills.name: procedural-gen
selected_skills.use: Guide deterministic galaxy, spatial field, and future generated-content work without compromising repeatable tests.

selected_skills.name: shader-programming
selected_skills.use: Guide point shaders, fade behavior, material effects, and GPU-cost-aware visual polish.

disciplines_not_selected.name: dialogue-systems
disciplines_not_selected.reason: No dialogue or narrative runner in the current interaction model.

disciplines_not_selected.name: game-ai
disciplines_not_selected.reason: No non-player behavior or pathfinding surface yet.

disciplines_not_selected.name: level-design
disciplines_not_selected.reason: Useful later, but current map/topology work is covered by procedural generation plus content tests.

disciplines_not_selected.name: save-systems
disciplines_not_selected.reason: No persistent game state beyond route/list navigation yet.

known_gap.name: physics-engine-lane
known_gap.reason: The selected gamedev disciplines tune the existing integrator; they do not select a real rigid-body/collision engine.

later_lugos_import.reason: Project-local candidate first; no Bran custody or global skill activation yet.
required_before_import: Decide whether to copy actual Apache-2.0 skill files or keep original distillation only.
Bind approval to the recorded upstream commit hash.
